features.featureTitle: In the Admin Panel 'Add Question' modal (frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestionModal.tsx), remove all four option image file picker inputs (Option 1–4). The modal must retain only: the single question image file picker (with live preview thumbnail), the correct option selector (radio buttons for A, B, C, D), and the Submit button. On submit, call the addQuestion backend function passing the single question image base64 data URI and empty strings (or a placeholder) for the four option image data fields to maintain backend compatibility. Close the modal on success, show a success toast, and refresh the question gallery.
